testcase.name: <golden:email_variants>
testcase.failure: Line 1: BUSINESS detected with 100.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: support@acme-corp.com Validator: email Line 2: GMAIL detected with 100.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: alice@gmail.com Validator: email Line 3: BUSINESS detected with 88.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: no-reply@internal.example.org Validator: email
